meaning: adj.[统]马尔可夫链的 马尔可夫过程的,无后效过程的
examples: The Statistical properties of Brownian bound oscillator under the Markovian limit are studied.
A three-state Markovian model of the F-PRMA system is developed based on Markov process theory.
The convergences of several genetic algorithms are studied by using Markovian chain theory in stochastic processes.
